items.summary: Update the application version string in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from '0.4.143' to '0.4.147'.

In the toolbar div of FileList.tsx, apply styling changes to exactly three buttons identified by XPath positions button[2], button[3], and button[4] within the toolbar's button group div: (1) Remove any border color styling from all three buttons. (2) button[2] (the File upload button): set background color to '#eff6ff' (very light blue). (3) button[3] and button[4] (the Folder-related buttons): set background color to '#fefce8' (very light yellow). No other buttons, components, styles, or logic may be changed.
